botanyguide-text: Wild Farming — Ecosystem This mod adds a living ecosystem layer to Vintage Story. Wild flowers, grasses, ferns, reeds, berry bushes and tree saplings reproduce, compete for space, and respond to soil, light, forest cover, and seasons. Seed Extraction Seeds from grain can be extracted by putting it into a crafting grid with a wooden pan. Seeds from vegetables and legumes can be extracted using shears in the crafting grid. Reed roots can be doubled by putting them in the crafting grid with a full bucket of water. Vine tips can be doubled the same way.
